TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tu sep tu enem mihcaan Zuy-se kakanen tu pah pilauytan tu mihcaan makatuduh 2026ŚĻīÁĎěŚ£ęťÖíŚźßŤ∑®ŚĻīŚ§ßÁĀę == tu sep tu nem mihcaan cay bulad cay demiad, i Zuy-se-wa-laey-pan-hua-sie pidangan Ke'-lang‚ÄĒMun-ta-na cacay nu " bunacan" " LeConstellation" nu kakanen tu pah mabakuhac makatuduh, sepat a bataan ku mapatayay nu tademaw, cacay a lasubu sabaw enem ku madukaay. saan ku Zuy-se kina nika tuduhan hakiya sipakayda i pacucukan tu epah i dikian ku nikatuduhan. nikasikawawan, Wa-laey-pan nu matumes ku padekuan nu cia-hu-pin nu lalumaan, duma nu madukaay sipatayda i Zuy-se duma nu kitidaan atu duma nu kanatalan a padekuan. 2026ŚĻī1śúą1śó•, , . nu hatiniay tu katenes, Wa-laey-pan u sapiliwku ku angangan ku sakaudip. kasikawawan nu kitidaan " aenengan bunac" " Le Constellation" idaw ku kakanen tu epah, labiiay nu pisiwbayan atu kahuy. Ilabu nu kakanen tupah taneng pacumudan tu tulu a lasubu ku tademaw, i salining sepat a bataan ku aeneng nu tademaw, idaw ku nu nanumay a tatabakuan atu mutabakuay, atu yadahay nu sapatahekal nu kasetsetan madubaay a tilibi. pulung nina luma' idaw ku tusa nu matatungdutay nu sasaan, idaw ku laliepahan i tida, sakatayda i kayakay nu sakacacay nu luma'an atu sakayhekal malalitin. u taydaay nu mukanay tupah u sining ku yadahay, caay pahanhan tu mihcaan. . saan ku pasibungay nu Ing-kuo, ina kakanen tupah " u sumamaday henay sa", micapitu sepata a bataan kuyunipisiwbayan. tu sep cay lim mihcaan, namaka Fa-kuo i Ke-si-cia a taleacawaan ci Ya-ke'. Muo-lei-ti "jacqes Moretti" atu ci Cie-si-ka. Muo-lei-ti " jessica Moretti" cakayen nuhini kina kakanen tu pah, misabaluhay misumad tu lalabu, ina maleacawaay idaw henay ku nipisiwbay tu dumaan. itidaay nu Zuy-se a mutaydaay midang saan tinapisiwbayan caay kaw kapahay tu sakaylabang, nai' ku pisungaay nu mikuliay a tademaw. tu sep cay siw mihcaan cay bulad nanutawya inai' tu ku taydaay mikisa tu sakay anzinan. (Jacques Moretti)ŚíĆŚāĎŤ•ŅŚć°¬∑Ťéęťõ∑Ťíā(Jessica Moretti) . kakaydaan ťĀéÁ®č katuduhan tawya, idaw ku cacayay a lasubuan nu tademaw itida pilisinan tu mamilawi tu sakatusa nu mihcaan, hucunu Zuy-se anu silisin tu baluhay nu mihcaan kanca milikad tu lamal, itini i O-cuo Ta-lu atu duma nu kanatalan hina adih kita. . madukaay ŚŹóŚģ≥ŤÄÖ nikatuduhan tu cacay nu demiadan, saan ku Zuy-se tina katuduhan makaala tu sepatay a bataan ku mapatayay, cay cay nem tademaw ku madukaay, duma nu madukaay atu mahedaway nu tademaw u dumaan a kanatalan nu taydaay midang, pasu Pi-li-se, Puo-he, Hun-lan, Fa-kuo, Yi-ta-li, Yi-se-lei " malatusaay nu kanatalan", Lu-sen-paw, Puo-lan, Pu-taw-ya, Say-e-wi-ya atu Cie-ke'. saan ku mialaay tu tademaw nu hikukian, ina madukaay katuud ku masakapahay. . nikudan nu kawaw šļčŚĺĆ Puo-n-lein-pang-kun pangkiw ku nipahataanšľĮśĀ©ŤĀĮťā¶ŚģģťôćŚćäśóó tapiingan nu kakanen tu pah idaw ku nipatideng tu tataydaan nu binacadan tu sakalaluman. tidaay nu padekuan tada matumes tu nu matuduhay nu tademawan caay tu kaw papacicien a micumud, saan tu Ke'-lan-Mun-ta-na niyadu'ay a binacadan amana pisaselic tu suleda nu kabalihenawan nu kawaw sa, macunus sa ku mutaydaay nu madukaay. Zuy-se-lein-pang wi-yun-huy saan tu pikulian nu matatungdutay nu kakulian pangkiwen ku nipahata sa mihinum tu mapatayay, ina kanatal lima a demiad ku sapihinum. Zuy-se Cung-tung ci Ci-yi.Pa-mu-lan caay sakamu tu pisiwgacuan tu sasakamuen, katukuh tu kalahukan sa musakamu, saan tu sasakamuen " ita a kanatal itini i likisi u pihacengay nu kalaluman nu kawaw". kasikadan ku madukaay nu tademaw, u Liw-se-se hetiken nu heni ku sakay pisiwgacuan nu nipawacaah tu lamal. .
S.PHON: == tu s…ôp tu …ôn…ôm mińß ¶aan zuj-s…ô kakan…ôn tu pańß pir~…ĺaujtan tu mińß ¶aan makatuduńß ************* == tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺad ¶aj d…ômiad, i zuj-s…ô-wa-r~…ĺa…ô-pan-ńßua-si…ô pidaŇčan k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč*mun-ta-na ¶a ¶aj nu " buna ¶an" " r~…ĺ…ô ¶onst…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺation" nu kakan…ôn tu pańß mabakuńßa ¶ makatuduńß, s…ôpat a bataan ku mapatajaj nu tad…ômaw, ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu sabaw …ôn…ôm ku madukaaj. saan ku zuj-s…ô kina nika tuduńßan ńßakija sipakajda i pa ¶u ¶ukan tu …ôpańß i dikian ku nikatuduńßan. nikasikawawan, wa-r~…ĺa…ô-pan nu matum…ôs ku pad…ôkuan nu ¶ia-ńßu-pin nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, duma nu madukaaj sipatajda i zuj-s…ô duma nu kitidaan atu duma nu kanatar~…ĺan a pad…ôkuan. *********, , . nu ńßatiniaj tu kat…ôn…ôs, wa-r~…ĺa…ô-pan u sapir~…ĺiwku ku aŇčaŇčan ku sakaudip. kasikawawan nu kitidaan " a…ôn…ôŇčan buna ¶" " r~…ĺ…ô ¶onst…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺation" idaw ku kakan…ôn tu …ôpańß, r~…ĺabiiaj nu pisiwbajan atu kańßuj. ir~…ĺabu nu kakan…ôn tupańß tan…ôŇč pa ¶umudan tu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ku tad…ômaw, i sar~…ĺiniŇč s…ôpat a bataan ku a…ôn…ôŇč nu tad…ômaw, idaw ku nu nanumaj a tatabakuan atu mutabakuaj, atu jadańßaj nu sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kas…ôts…ôtan madubaaj a tir~…ĺibi. pur~…ĺuŇč nina r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° idaw ku tusa nu matatuŇčdutaj nu sasaan, idaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺi…ôpańßan i tida, sakatajda i kajakaj nu saka ¶a ¶aj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an atu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin. u tajdaaj nu mukanaj tupańß u siniŇč ku jadańßaj, ¶aaj pańßanńßan tu mińß ¶aan. . saan ku pasibuŇčaj nu iŇč-kuo, ina kakan…ôn tupańß " u sumamadaj ńß…ônaj sa", mi ¶apitu s…ôpata a bataan kujunipisiwbajan. tu s…ôp ¶aj r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, namaka fa-kuo i k…ô-si- ¶ia a tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan ¶i ja-k…ô Ē~ °. muo-r~…ĺ…ôi-ti "ja ¶*…ôs mor…ôtti" atu ¶i ¶i…ô-si-ka. muo-r~…ĺ…ôi-ti " j…ôssi ¶a mor…ôtti" ¶akaj…ôn nuńßini kina kakan…ôn tu pańß, misabar~…ĺuńßaj misumad tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu, ina mar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaaj idaw ńß…ônaj ku nipisiwbaj tu dumaan. itidaaj nu zuj-s…ô a mutajdaaj midaŇč saan tinapisiwbajan ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj tu sakajr~…ĺabaŇč, nai Ē~ ° ku pisuŇčaaj nu mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw. tu s…ôp ¶aj siw mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺad nanutawja inai Ē~ ° tu ku tajdaaj mikisa tu sakaj anzinan. (*a ¶*u…ôs mor…ôtti)********(*…ôssi ¶a mor…ôtti) . kakajdaan ** katuduńßan tawja, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺasubuan nu tad…ômaw itida pir~…ĺisinan tu mamir~…ĺawi tu sakatusa nu mińß ¶aan, ńßu ¶unu zuj-s…ô anu sir~…ĺisin tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan kan ¶a mir~…ĺikad tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ, itini i o- ¶uo ta-r~…ĺu atu duma nu kanatar~…ĺan ńßina adińß kita. . madukaaj *** nikatuduńßan tu ¶a ¶aj nu d…ômiadan, saan ku zuj-s…ô tina katuduńßan makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpataj a bataan ku mapatajaj, ¶aj ¶aj n…ôm tad…ômaw ku madukaaj, duma nu madukaaj atu mańß…ôdawaj nu tad…ômaw u dumaan a kanatar~…ĺan nu tajdaaj midaŇč, pasu pi-r~…ĺi-s…ô, puo-ńß…ô, ńßun-r~…ĺan, fa-kuo, ji-ta-r~…ĺi, ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi " mar~…ĺatusaaj nu kanatar~…ĺan", r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw, puo-r~…ĺan, pu-taw-ja, saj-…ô-wi-ja atu ¶i…ô-k…ô Ē~ °. saan ku miar~…ĺaaj tu tad…ômaw nu ńßikukian, ina madukaaj katuud ku masakapańßaj. . nikudan nu kawaw ** puo-n-r~…ĺ…ôin-paŇč-kun paŇčkiw ku nipańßataan******** tapiiŇčan nu kakan…ôn tu pańß idaw ku nipatid…ôŇč tu tatajdaan nu bina ¶adan tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuman. tidaaj nu pad…ôkuan tada matum…ôs tu nu matuduńßaj nu tad…ômawan ¶aaj tu kaw papa ¶i ¶i…ôn a mi ¶umud, saan tu k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan-mun-ta-na nijadu Ē~ °aj a bina ¶adan amana pisas…ôr~…ĺi ¶ tu sur~…ĺ…ôda nu kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan nu kawaw sa, ma ¶unus sa ku mutajdaaj nu madukaaj. zuj-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôin-paŇč wi-jun-ńßuj saan tu pikur~…ĺian nu matatuŇčdutaj nu kakur~…ĺian paŇčkiw…ôn ku nipańßata sa mińßinum tu mapatajaj, ina kanatar~…ĺ r~…ĺima a d…ômiad ku sapińßinum. zuj-s…ô ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶i-ji.pa-mu-r~…ĺan ¶aaj sakamu tu pisiwga ¶uan tu sasakamu…ôn, katukuńß tu kar~…ĺańßukan sa musakamu, saan tu sasakamu…ôn " ita a kanatar~…ĺ itini i r~…ĺikisi u pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman nu kawaw". kasikadan ku madukaaj nu tad…ômaw, u r~…ĺiw-s…ô-s…ô ńß…ôtik…ôn nu ńß…ôni ku sakaj pisiwga ¶uan nu nipawa ¶aańß tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. .
S.FORM: == tu sep tu enem mihcaan Zuy-se kakanen tu pah pilauytan tu mihcaan makatuduh 2026ŚĻīÁĎěŚ£ęťÖíŚźßŤ∑®ŚĻīŚ§ßÁĀę == tu sep tu nem mihcaan cay bulad cay demiad, i Zuy-se-wa-laey-pan-hua-sie pidangan Ke'-lang‚ÄĒMun-ta-na cacay nu " bunacan" " LeConstellation" nu kakanen tu pah mabakuhac makatuduh, sepat a bataan ku mapatayay nu tademaw, cacay a lasubu sabaw enem ku madukaay. saan ku Zuy-se kina nika tuduhan hakiya sipakayda i pacucukan tu epah i dikian ku nikatuduhan. nikasikawawan, Wa-laey-pan nu matumes ku padekuan nu cia-hu-pin nu lalumaan, duma nu madukaay sipatayda i Zuy-se duma nu kitidaan atu duma nu kanatalan a padekuan. 2026ŚĻī1śúą1śó•, , . nu hatiniay tu katenes, Wa-laey-pan u sapiliwku ku angangan ku sakaudip. kasikawawan nu kitidaan " aenengan bunac" " Le Constellation" idaw ku kakanen tu epah, labiiay nu pisiwbayan atu kahuy. Ilabu nu kakanen tupah taneng pacumudan tu tulu a lasubu ku tademaw, i salining sepat a bataan ku aeneng nu tademaw, idaw ku nu nanumay a tatabakuan atu mutabakuay, atu yadahay nu sapatahekal nu kasetsetan madubaay a tilibi. pulung nina luma' idaw ku tusa nu matatungdutay nu sasaan, idaw ku laliepahan i tida, sakatayda i kayakay nu sakacacay nu luma'an atu sakayhekal malalitin. u taydaay nu mukanay tupah u sining ku yadahay, caay pahanhan tu mihcaan. . saan ku pasibungay nu Ing-kuo, ina kakanen tupah " u sumamaday henay sa", micapitu sepata a bataan kuyunipisiwbayan. tu sep cay lim mihcaan, namaka Fa-kuo i Ke-si-cia a taleacawaan ci Ya-ke'. Muo-lei-ti "jacqes Moretti" atu ci Cie-si-ka. Muo-lei-ti " jessica Moretti" cakayen nuhini kina kakanen tu pah, misabaluhay misumad tu lalabu, ina maleacawaay idaw henay ku nipisiwbay tu dumaan. itidaay nu Zuy-se a mutaydaay midang saan tinapisiwbayan caay kaw kapahay tu sakaylabang, nai' ku pisungaay nu mikuliay a tademaw. tu sep cay siw mihcaan cay bulad nanutawya inai' tu ku taydaay mikisa tu sakay anzinan. (Jacques Moretti)ŚíĆŚāĎŤ•ŅŚć°¬∑Ťéęťõ∑Ťíā(Jessica Moretti) . kakaydaan ťĀéÁ®č katuduhan tawya, idaw ku cacayay a lasubuan nu tademaw itida pilisinan tu mamilawi tu sakatusa nu mihcaan, hucunu Zuy-se anu silisin tu baluhay nu mihcaan kanca milikad tu lamal, itini i O-cuo Ta-lu atu duma nu kanatalan hina adih kita. . madukaay ŚŹóŚģ≥ŤÄÖ nikatuduhan tu cacay nu demiadan, saan ku Zuy-se tina katuduhan makaala tu sepatay a bataan ku mapatayay, cay cay nem tademaw ku madukaay, duma nu madukaay atu mahedaway nu tademaw u dumaan a kanatalan nu taydaay midang, pasu Pi-li-se, Puo-he, Hun-lan, Fa-kuo, Yi-ta-li, Yi-se-lei " malatusaay nu kanatalan", Lu-sen-paw, Puo-lan, Pu-taw-ya, Say-e-wi-ya atu Cie-ke'. saan ku mialaay tu tademaw nu hikukian, ina madukaay katuud ku masakapahay. . nikudan nu kawaw šļčŚĺĆ Puo-n-lein-pang-kun pangkiw ku nipahataanšľĮśĀ©ŤĀĮťā¶ŚģģťôćŚćäśóó tapiingan nu kakanen tu pah idaw ku nipatideng tu tataydaan nu binacadan tu sakalaluman. tidaay nu padekuan tada matumes tu nu matuduhay nu tademawan caay tu kaw papacicien a micumud, saan tu Ke'-lan-Mun-ta-na niyadu'ay a binacadan amana pisaselic tu suleda nu kabalihenawan nu kawaw sa, macunus sa ku mutaydaay nu madukaay. Zuy-se-lein-pang wi-yun-huy saan tu pikulian nu matatungdutay nu kakulian pangkiwen ku nipahata sa mihinum tu mapatayay, ina kanatal lima a demiad ku sapihinum. Zuy-se Cung-tung ci Ci-yi.Pa-mu-lan caay sakamu tu pisiwgacuan tu sasakamuen, katukuh tu kalahukan sa musakamu, saan tu sasakamuen " ita a kanatal itini i likisi u pihacengay nu kalaluman nu kawaw". kasikadan ku madukaay nu tademaw, u Liw-se-se hetiken nu heni ku sakay pisiwgacuan nu nipawacaah tu lamal. .

zuj-s…ô-wa-r~…ĺa…ô-pan-ńßua-si…ô pidaŇčan k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺaŇč*mun-ta-na ¶a ¶aj nu " buna ¶an" " r~…ĺ…ô ¶onst…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺation" nu kakan…ôn tu pańß mabakuńßa ¶ makatuduńß, s…ôpat a bataan ku mapatajaj nu tad…ômaw, ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu sabaw …ôn…ôm ku madukaaj. saan ku zuj-s…ô kina nika tuduńßan ńßakija sipakajda i pa ¶u ¶ukan tu …ôpańß i dikian ku nikatuduńßan. nikasikawawan, wa-r~…ĺa…ô-pan nu matum…ôs ku pad…ôkuan nu ¶ia-ńßu-pin nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, duma nu madukaaj sipatajda i zuj-s…ô duma nu kitidaan atu duma nu kanatar~…ĺan a pad…ôkuan. *********, , . nu ńßatiniaj tu kat…ôn…ôs, wa-r~…ĺa…ô-pan u sapir~…ĺiwku ku aŇčaŇčan ku sakaudip. kasikawawan nu kitidaan " a…ôn…ôŇčan buna ¶" " r~…ĺ…ô ¶onst…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺation" idaw ku kakan…ôn tu …ôpańß, r~…ĺabiiaj nu pisiwbajan atu kańßuj. ir~…ĺabu nu kakan…ôn tupańß tan…ôŇč pa ¶umudan tu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ku tad…ômaw, i sar~…ĺiniŇč s…ôpat a bataan ku a…ôn…ôŇč nu tad…ômaw, idaw ku nu nanumaj a tatabakuan atu mutabakuaj, atu jadańßaj nu sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin. u tajdaaj nu mukanaj tupańß u siniŇč ku jadańßaj, ¶aaj pańßanńßan tu mińß ¶aan. . saan ku pasibuŇčaj nu iŇč-kuo, ina kakan…ôn tupańß " u sumamadaj ńß…ônaj sa", mi ¶apitu s…ôpata a bataan kujunipisiwbajan. tu s…ôp ¶aj r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, namaka fa-kuo i k…ô-si- ¶ia a tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan ¶i ja-k…ô Ē~ °. muo-r~…ĺ…ôi-ti "ja ¶*…ôs mor…ôtti" atu ¶i ¶i…ô-si-ka. muo-r~…ĺ…ôi-ti " j…ôssi ¶a mor…ôtti" ¶akaj…ôn nuńßini kina kakan…ôn tu pańß, misabar~…ĺuńßaj misumad tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu, ina mar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaaj idaw ńß…ônaj ku nipisiwbaj tu dumaan. itidaaj nu zuj-s…ô a mutajdaaj midaŇč saan tinapisiwbajan ¶aaj kaw kapańßaj tu sakajr~…ĺabaŇč, nai Ē~ ° ku pisuŇčaaj nu mikur~…ĺiaj a tad…ômaw. tu s…ôp ¶aj siw mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺad nanutawja inai Ē~ ° tu ku tajdaaj mikisa tu sakaj anzinan. (*a ¶*u…ôs mor…ôtti)********(*…ôssi ¶a mor…ôtti) . kakajdaan ** katuduńßan tawja, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a r~…ĺasubuan nu tad…ômaw itida pir~…ĺisinan tu mamir~…ĺawi tu sakatusa nu mińß ¶aan, ńßu ¶unu zuj-s…ô anu sir~…ĺisin tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan kan ¶a mir~…ĺikad tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ, itini i o- ¶uo ta-r~…ĺu atu duma nu kanatar~…ĺan ńßina adińß kita. . madukaaj *** nikatuduńßan tu ¶a ¶aj nu d…ômiadan, saan ku zuj-s…ô tina katuduńßan makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpataj a bataan ku mapatajaj, ¶aj ¶aj n…ôm tad…ômaw ku madukaaj, duma nu madukaaj atu mańß…ôdawaj nu tad…ômaw u dumaan a kanatar~…ĺan nu tajdaaj midaŇč, pasu pi-r~…ĺi-s…ô, puo-ńß…ô, ńßun-r~…ĺan, fa-kuo, ji-ta-r~…ĺi, ji-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi " mar~…ĺatusaaj nu kanatar~…ĺan", r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw, puo-r~…ĺan, pu-taw-ja, saj-…ô-wi-ja atu ¶i…ô-k…ô Ē~ °. saan ku miar~…ĺaaj tu tad…ômaw nu ńßikukian, ina madukaaj katuud ku masakapańßaj. . nikudan nu kawaw ** puo-n-r~…ĺ…ôin-paŇč-kun paŇčkiw ku nipańßataan******** tapiiŇčan nu kakan…ôn tu pańß idaw ku nipatid…ôŇč tu tatajdaan nu bina ¶adan tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺuman. tidaaj nu pad…ôkuan tada matum…ôs tu nu matuduńßaj nu tad…ômawan ¶aaj tu kaw papa ¶i ¶i…ôn a mi ¶umud, saan tu k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺan-mun-ta-na nijadu Ē~ °aj a bina ¶adan amana pisas…ôr~…ĺi ¶ tu sur~…ĺ…ôda nu kabar~…ĺińß…ônawan nu kawaw sa, ma ¶unus sa ku mutajdaaj nu madukaaj. zuj-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôin-paŇč wi-jun-ńßuj saan tu pikur~…ĺian nu matatuŇčdutaj nu kakur~…ĺian paŇčkiw…ôn ku nipańßata sa mińßinum tu mapatajaj, ina kanatar~…ĺ r~…ĺima a d…ômiad ku sapińßinum. zuj-s…ô ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ¶i-ji.pa-mu-r~…ĺan ¶aaj sakamu tu pisiwga ¶uan tu sasakamu…ôn, katukuńß tu kar~…ĺańßukan sa musakamu, saan tu sasakamu…ôn " ita a kanatar~…ĺ itini i r~…ĺikisi u pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman nu kawaw". kasikadan ku madukaaj nu tad…ômaw, u r~…ĺiw-s…ô-s…ô ńß…ôtik…ôn nu ńß…ôni ku sakaj pisiwga ¶uan nu nipawa ¶aańß tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. .
